caption: A person's hands are seen unboxing a sports collectible against a neutral background. They open a white box featuring the text "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" and "2020," removing a clear protective case. As the sequence progresses, the person carefully extracts a trading card encased in a plastic slab from the packaging. In the lower half of the view, a persistent graphic overlay includes a red and white logo that reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.com." Two small inset windows are visible: one showing a person in a white shirt and another showing a man wearing a black t-shirt and a baseball cap. The action transitions from the initial opening of the box to the detailed handling of the encased card, while the promotional branding and inset videos remain static on the screen.
